title: Intuitive Insights into System Behavior
summary: This page analyzes resonance by taking the limit of a convolution expression as ϵ → 0, showing that the response acquires a multiplicative factor of t and becomes y(t) = Ate^{λt}. It explains that resonance is cumulative, remains bounded for asymptotically stable modes with Re λ < 0, and grows unbounded linearly in time for marginally stable oscillatory modes λ = jω.

figures.caption: Buildup of system response in resonance.
